channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Nigeria Women Shine in 4x400m Relay at African Championships
item.description: Team Nigeria show say dem no dey carry last for 2026 African Senior Athletics Championships wey happen for Accra, Ghana. The women 4x400m relay team, wey consist of Esther Okon, Toheebat Jimoh, Jecint...

item.title: Survival at Sea: The Story of Terry Jo Duperrault, the Sole Survivor of the Bluebelle Tragedy
item.description: In November 1961, 11-year-old Terry Jo Duperrault survived one of the most shocking maritime tragedies in American history. The Duperrault family from Green Bay, Wisconsin, including her parents Arthu...

item.title: Toronto Maple Leafs Make Changes to Assistant General Managers Amid Front Office Overhaul
item.description: The Toronto Maple Leafs have announced significant changes to their front office as part of a broader restructuring. Assistant general managers Brandon Pridham and Derek Clancey have mutually parted w...

item.title: GOP Pollster Criticizes Lindsey Graham's Praise of Trump-Aligned Candidates
item.description: A recent interview with U.S. Senator Lindsey Graham (R-SC) has sparked sharp criticism from longtime GOP pollster and political commentator Sarah Longwell. During an appearance on NBC News' 'Meet the ...

item.title: Authorities Arrest Suspect in 2024 Zambales Triple Murder Case
item.description: Police authorities in the Philippines have arrested the primary suspect in the 2024 Zambales triple murder case, which involved the killing of a doctor, her three-month-old child, and a household help...

item.title: Kris Kelly’s Career and Earnings in Gold Mining and Television
item.description: Kris Kelly, a well-known American gold miner and TV personality, has an estimated net worth of $200,000. He gained fame through the Discovery Channel shows Bering Sea Gold and Gold Rush: The Dirt, whe...

item.title: Alex Eala set to face Oleksandra Oliynykova in Strasbourg Open opening round
item.description: Filipino tennis sensation Alex Eala is all set to begin her campaign in the 2026 Strasbourg Open, facing Ukraine's Oleksandra Oliynykova in the first round. The Strasbourg Open, officially known as In...

item.title: Alex Smalley Holds Two-Stroke Lead Heading into Final Round at 2026 PGA Championship
item.description: The third round of the 2026 PGA Championship at Aronimink Golf Club saw intense competition, with the lead changing hands multiple times. By the end of Saturday, Alex Smalley emerged as the solo leade...

item.title: David Russell's Equis Eyes Major Financial Move in Renewable Energy Sector
item.description: David Russell, a prominent figure in Australia's renewable energy industry, is gearing up for another significant financial event through his company, Equis. Having previously sold Equis Energy, now k...

item.title: Bulgaria wins 2026 Eurovision Song Contest amid boycott over Israel's participation
item.description: Bulgaria has claimed its first-ever Eurovision victory at the 70th edition held in Vienna, Austria. Singer Dara, performing the catchy track 'Bangaranga', triumphed with 516 points, narrowly beating I...

item.title: Behind-the-Scenes Glimpse of Jayne Mansfield and Joan Collins in The Wayward Bus (1957)
item.description: The 1957 film 'The Wayward Bus' brought together two iconic actresses of the 1950s: the blonde bombshell Jayne Mansfield and the elegant British star Joan Collins. Based on John Steinbeck’s novel, the...

item.title: Drone strike hits UAE nuclear power plant; no injuries reported amid rising US-Iran tensions
item.description: Officials in the United Arab Emirates have confirmed that a drone strike targeted the country's only nuclear power plant, causing a fire but no injuries or radiological hazards. The UAE defence minist...

item.title: Mamelodi Sundowns secure narrow 1-0 lead over AS Far in CAF Champions League final first leg
item.description: Mamelodi Sundowns took a slender 1-0 advantage into the second leg of the CAF Champions League final after defeating AS Far in the first leg played in Pretoria on Sunday. A brilliant left-footed free-...

item.title: Swatch temporarily closes multiple stores as queues form for new Royal Pop pocket watch
item.description: Swatch stores in Manchester and Liverpool were closed for a second consecutive day after large crowds gathered, eager to purchase the brand's new £335 'Royal Pop' pocket watch, launched in collaborati...

item.title: Toronto police increase efforts to locate missing 14-year-old girl from Earl Bales Park
item.description: Toronto police have escalated their search for a 14-year-old girl who was last seen at Earl Bales Park. Authorities have been actively coordinating search efforts, including ground patrols and public ...

item.title: Montreal Canadiens face pivotal Game 7 that could define their future
item.description: The Montreal Canadiens’ upcoming Game 7 against the Buffalo Sabres represents a critical juncture for the team, potentially shaping their trajectory for years. After a devastating 8-3 loss in Game 6, ...

item.title: Rahul Gandhi criticises Education Ministry as 'Department of Disasters' amid NEET leak and CBSE controversies
item.description: Congress leader and Leader of Opposition Rahul Gandhi has strongly attacked the BJP-led Central government and Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan, labelling the Education Ministry as a 'department ...

item.title: Kenyans and Friends Support Former Meru Governor Kiraitu Murungi Following Daughter's Death
item.description: Former Meru Governor Kiraitu Murungi is grieving the loss of his youngest daughter, Anita Kendi Murungi, who passed away on May 14 after a brief illness. The news of her untimely death sparked an outp...

item.title: Search continues for missing Durban truck driver Poovin Nairainsamy after his vehicle was swept away in Wolseley floods
item.description: The desperate search is still ongoing for Durban truck driver Poovin Nairainsamy, who went missing after his Scania R580 truck was swept away by strong floodwaters in Wolseley in the Western Cape. The...

item.title: Cape Town City and Milford FC secure PSL promotion-relegation playoffs
item.description: Cape Town City and Milford FC have both qualified for the Premier Soccer League’s promotion-relegation playoffs following the final round of the Motsepe Foundation Championship. Kruger United were con...
